text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar in a analysis piece argues that the United States cannot serve as a neutral mediator in the Lebanon‑Israel conflict because it is a direct party to the war – militarily, politically and financially supporting Israel. Historical examples including Camp David (1978), Oslo (1993) and the 2024 ceasefire mechanism show US‑led mediation has produced fragile, unbalanced arrangements that favour Israel. Accepting a biased mediator, the article concludes, does not end the war but transfers it to an uneven negotiating table, weakening the weaker party - in this case Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 《Al-Akhbar》在一篇分析文章中指出，美国无法在黎巴嫩与以色列的冲突中担任中立调解人，因为它本身就是战争的直接参与方——在军事、政治和财政上支持以色列。戴维营协议（1978年）、奥斯陆协议（1993年）和2024年停火机制等历史案例表明，美国主导的调解产生了脆弱且不平衡的安排，偏袒以色列。文章总结称，接受一个有偏见的调解人并不能结束战争，而是将其转移到不平等的谈判桌上，从而削弱较弱的一方——在本案中即黎巴嫩。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Channel 15 in Hebrew: The Chief of Staff has directed the Israeli army to an immediate state of alert in preparation for war with Iran. A decision on resuming the bombing has not yet been made.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 希伯来语第15频道：参谋长已指示以色列军队进入即时戒备状态，为与伊朗的战争做准备。关于恢复轰炸的决定尚未做出。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A Hamas delegation is holding talks in Cairo with Egyptian mediators and Nikolay Mladenov, the senior representative of the US‑backed Peace Council, to discuss the second phase of the Gaza ceasefire – including the disarmament of Hamas and the entry of a technocratic committee to govern the Strip. Hamas insists on halting Israeli violations first and has rejected Mladenov’s claims about aid volumes. The Peace Council has received less than $1 billion of the $17 billion pledged for Gaza, with only the U.S., UAE and Morocco contributing so far, hindering reconstruction. The national committee for Gaza remains stuck in Cairo with no real power and domestic legitimacy. Israel is sceptical that Hamas will agree to give up its weapons and has already started Exigency plans to reopen the Gaza front if talks do fail. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 哈马斯代表团正在开罗与埃及调解人及美国支持的和平委员会高级代表尼古拉·姆拉德诺夫（Nikolay Mladenov）举行会谈，讨论加沙停火的第二阶段——包括哈马斯解除武装以及技术官僚委员会进入加沙地带进行治理。哈马斯坚持首先停止以色列的违规行为，并拒绝了姆拉德诺夫关于援助物资数量的说法。和平委员会承诺为加沙提供的170亿美元援助中，目前仅收到不到10亿美元，且迄今只有美国、阿联酋和摩洛哥提供了捐款，这阻碍了重建工作。加沙国家委员会仍滞留在开罗，没有实权和国内合法性。以色列怀疑哈马斯是否会同意放弃武器，并已开始制定应急计划，如果谈判失败，将重新开启加沙战线。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Iran's internet shutdown has reached day 44, now the longest nationwide blackout ever recorded. Source: NetBlocks
text_zh: 伊朗互联网中断已进入第44天，这是有记录以来最长的全国性网络封锁。来源：NetBlocks

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan threatened that Turkey could carry out a military intervention against Israel similar to its operations in Libya and Nagorno‑Karabakh. “Just as we entered Libya and Karabakh, we can enter Israel. There is no reason not to do it,” he said during a speech. Erdogan accused Israel of killing hundreds of innocent Lebanese during the ceasefire and called Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu “blinded by blood and hatred." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 土耳其总统雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安威胁称，土耳其可能会对以色列进行军事干预，类似于其在利比亚和纳戈尔诺-卡拉巴赫的行动。他在演讲中表示：“就像我们进入利比亚和卡拉巴赫一样，我们也可以进入以色列。没有理由不这样做。”埃尔多安指责以色列在停火期间杀害了数百名无辜的黎巴嫩人，并称以色列总理内塔尼亚胡“被鲜血和仇恨蒙蔽了双眼”。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel NYT, citing 2 Iranian sources: 3 core disputes remain in the talks 🔹 Strait of Hormuz: Iran says reopening comes only after a final deal 🔹 Enriched uranium: roughly 400 kg remains unresolved after failed compromise 🔹 Frozen funds: Tehran is demanding the release of about $27B held abroad tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）援引两名伊朗消息人士的话称，谈判中仍存在3个核心争议：🔹 霍尔木兹海峡：伊朗表示只有在达成最终协议后才会重新开放 🔹 浓缩铀：在妥协失败后，约400公斤浓缩铀的问题仍未解决 🔹 被冻结资金：德黑兰要求解冻存放在国外的约270亿美元资金 推文

text: Open Source Intel USS Ford and its carrier strike group in the Mediterranean have completed a resupply of ammunition and supplies. This week could see three U.S. carrier strike groups in CENTCOM area: •USS Lincoln •USS Ford •USS Bush 🇺🇸 USN TRACKING: CSG-12 Location Confirmed Even with the deliberate delays on Eastern Med imagery, an Apr 10 pass finally dropped and definitively answers the whereabouts of the USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78). 🔸 Caught CSG-12 during an UNREP day. CVN-78 is pulling up alongside (or just finished) a Supply-class fast combat support ship (USNS Supply), flanked by 2x Arleigh Burke-class destroyers. The group is operating ~360km SW of RAF Akrotiri This capture puts the recent Red Sea SAR anomaly to bed. The Ford has not pushed south through the Suez; she remains firmly stationed in the Eastern Med. - MT Anderson tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）在地中海的福特号航空母舰及其航母打击群已完成弹药和补给的重新装填。本周，中央司令部（CENTCOM）区域内可能会出现三个美国航母打击群：•林肯号（USS Lincoln） •福特号（USS Ford） •布什号（USS Bush） 🇺🇸 美国海军追踪：CSG-12位置已确认。尽管东地中海的图像发布存在刻意延迟，但4月10日的卫星过境图像最终确定了杰拉尔德·R·福特号（CVN-78）的位置。 🔸 在补给日捕捉到了CSG-12。CVN-78正停靠在补给级快速战斗支援舰（USNS Supply）旁（或刚完成补给），两侧有2艘阿利·伯克级驱逐舰护航。该编队正在阿克罗蒂里皇家空军基地西南约360公里处行动。这次捕捉证实了最近红海搜救异常的传闻。福特号并未向南穿过苏伊士运河；它仍稳稳地驻扎在东地中海。 - MT Anderson 推文

text: OSINTdefender After two previous attempts over the previous several hours, the Pakistani-flagged crude oil tanker "Shalamar" appears to be proceeding inbound to the Persian Gulf through the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043283680743801245/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在过去几个小时内尝试了两次后，悬挂巴基斯坦国旗的“Shalamar”号原油油轮似乎正经由霍尔木兹海峡驶入波斯湾。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043283680743801245/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC Fars News: Iran has no plans to hold another round of talks. Let’s see. U.S. Vice President JD Vance: "The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement. And I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America. So, we go back to the U.S. having not come to an agreement. They have chosen not to accept our terms." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）法尔斯通讯社：伊朗没有计划举行新一轮会谈。让我们拭目以待。美国副总统JD·万斯：“坏消息是我们没有达成协议。我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更坏的消息。所以，我们回到美国未达成协议的状态。他们选择了不接受我们的条款。” - 开源情报 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CNN: U.S. Vice President JD Vance said no agreement was reached with Iran after 21 hours of marathon talks in Islamabad, with the US giving its “final and best offer." Iran’s lead negotiator, parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, said the…" ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia has restored its East‑West oil pipeline to full capacity after attacks last week that caused a loss of approximately 700,000 barrels per day. The 1,200‑kilometre pipeline bypasses the Strait of Hormuz. Pumping capacity has returned to about 7 million barrels per day, with Manifa field producing 300,000 barrels per day. Work continues to restore full production at the Khurais field. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CNN：美国副总统JD·万斯表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的马拉松式会谈后，未与伊朗达成协议，美国给出了“最终且最好的提议”。伊朗首席谈判代表、议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示……” ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 沙特阿拉伯在遭遇上周导致每天损失约70万桶石油的袭击后，已将其东西向输油管道恢复至满负荷运转。这条1200公里的管道绕过了霍尔木兹海峡。输送能力已恢复至每天约700万桶，Manifa油田每天生产30万桶。Khurais油田恢复全面生产的工作仍在继续。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰🇱🇧 US‑Iran talks in Islamabad ended without a breakthrough after nine hours. Iran presented reasonable initiatives but excessive U.S. demands prevented a framework, Per Tasnim. The Key obstacles: Lebanon and the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. refused…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 CNN : U.S. Vice President JD Vance said no agreement was reached with Iran after 21 hours of marathon talks in Islamabad, with the US giving its “final and best offer." Iran’s lead negotiator, parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, said the US failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation. Primary sticking points included Iran’s refusal to abandon its nuclear programme. The future of the two‑week ceasefire and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz are now in doubt. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰🇱🇧 美伊伊斯兰堡会谈在九小时后结束，未取得突破。据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，伊朗提出了合理的倡议，但美国过分的要求阻碍了框架的达成。关键障碍：黎巴嫩和霍尔木兹海峡。美国拒绝……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 CNN：美国副总统JD·万斯表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的马拉松式会谈后，未与伊朗达成协议，美国给出了“最终且最好的提议”。伊朗首席谈判代表、议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，美国未能获得伊朗代表团的信任。主要症结包括伊朗拒绝放弃其核计划。为期两周的停火和霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放现在都存在疑问。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf: "The United States failed to gain Iran’s trust in response to our initiatives." ➡️ Before the negotiations, I emphasized that we have the necessary goodwill and determination, but due to the experiences of the previous two wars, we do not trust the other side. ➡️ My colleagues in the Iranian delegation at “Minab 168” presented forward-looking initiatives, but in the end, the other side failed to earn the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of talks. ➡️ The United States understood our logic and principles, and now it is time for it to decide whether it can gain our trust or not. ➡️ At all times, we consider “power-based diplomacy” as another approach alongside military struggle to secure the rights of the Iranian people, and we will not cease for a moment our efforts to consolidate the achievements of 40 days of Iran’s national defense. ➡️ I appreciate the efforts of the friendly and brotherly country of Pakistan in facilitating this negotiation process, and I send my greetings to the people of Pakistan. ➡️ Iran is one body with 90 million souls. I thank the entire heroic nation of Iran, who—following the guidance of the Supreme Leader—supported their compatriots by taking to the streets and sending their prayers with us. I also commend my colleagues for their efforts in these intensive 21-hour negotiations. ➡️ Long live and prosper beloved Iran! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫：“美国未能获得伊朗的信任，以回应我们的倡议。” ➡️ 在谈判之前，我强调我们有必要的善意和决心，但由于前两次战争的经历，我们不信任对方。 ➡️ 我在伊朗代表团的同事在“Minab 168”会议上提出了前瞻性的倡议，但最终，对方在本轮会谈中未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。 ➡️ 美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则，现在是时候让它决定是否能赢得我们的信任了。 ➡️ 我们始终将“实力外交”视为与军事斗争并行的另一种途径，以捍卫伊朗人民的权利，我们将一刻也不会停止努力巩固伊朗40天国防的成果。 ➡️ 我感谢友好兄弟国家巴基斯坦在促进这一谈判进程中所做的努力，并向巴基斯坦人民致以问候。 ➡️ 伊朗是一个拥有9000万灵魂的统一体。我感谢全体英雄的伊朗人民，他们遵循最高领袖的指导，走上街头支持他们的同胞，并与我们一起祈祷。我也赞扬我的同事们在这次紧张的21小时谈判中所做的努力。 ➡️ 伟大的伊朗万岁，繁荣昌盛！ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Argentina’s debt to the IMF has climbed about 36% over the past year to roughly $57 billion, largely due to a new $20 billion. The new disbursements have increased Argentina’s total exposure, making it the IMF’s largest borrower.
text_zh: 阿根廷对国际货币基金组织（IMF）的债务在过去一年中攀升了约36%，达到约570亿美元，这主要是由于新增了200亿美元贷款。新的拨款增加了阿根廷的总风险敞口，使其成为IMF最大的借款国。

text: Iranian lawmaker says if the US does not pay war compensation, Iran will seize and sell hostile ships in the Persian Gulf.
text_zh: 伊朗议员表示，如果美国不支付战争赔偿，伊朗将扣押并出售波斯湾内的敌对船只。

text: The Spectator Index Iran's Speaker of Parliament Mohammad Ghalibaf says that 'due to the experiences of the two previous wars, we have no trust in the opposing side'. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043275436399149447/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·卡利巴夫表示，“由于前两次战争的经历，我们对对方没有任何信任”。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043275436399149447/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel BIGGER PICTURE: HORMUZ Iran’s main leverage is the Strait of Hormuz, with roughly 20% of global oil flows passing through it. By flexing control, the regime is playing its strongest card. But that move comes with MASSIVE consequences. Since the Hormuz is weaponized, the world will now accelerate its workarounds: •Saudi Arabia will most definitely expand its East-West pipeline capacity •Gulf states will begin invest heavily in alternative export routes •Israel will emerge as a potential corridor for energy transit These shifts won’t happen overnight, but they are now inevitable. What this means: The more Iran leans on Hormuz, the faster global energy flows reroute around it. Over time, that erodes Tehran’s leverage and cuts into its long-term power. Bottom line, we will see some short-term pressure as the regime plays its strongest hand. Long term, this is a massive strategic failure of historic scale that will come back to bite them very hard. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）大局观：霍尔木兹海峡。伊朗的主要筹码是霍尔木兹海峡，全球约20%的石油流量经过这里。通过展示控制力，该政权正在打出其最强的一张牌。但这一举动会带来巨大的后果。由于霍尔木兹海峡被武器化，世界现在将加速寻找替代方案：•沙特阿拉伯肯定会扩大其东西向管道的输送能力 •海湾国家将开始大量投资于替代出口路线 •以色列将成为能源过境的潜在走廊。这些转变不会在一夜之间发生，但现在已不可避免。这意味着：伊朗越依赖霍尔木兹海峡，全球能源流绕过它的速度就越快。随着时间的推移，这将削弱德黑兰的筹码，并削减其长期权力。底线是，随着该政权打出其最强的一张牌，我们将看到一些短期压力。从长远来看，这是一个历史规模的巨大战略失败，最终会严重反噬他们。 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: “U.S. Navy sailors prepare aircraft for nighttime flight operations over the U.S. Central Command operating area.” 👀 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043271770996666611/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Looking like the U.S. has become the world’s emergency Gas station. A surge of empty tankers was seen moving toward the U.S. to load crude, as markets strained by disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz scramble for supply. Credit: @Rory_Johnston https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043271265323003944/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）看起来美国已成为世界的紧急加油站。随着霍尔木兹海峡的中断导致市场供应紧张，大量空油轮正涌向美国装载原油。来源：@Rory_Johnston https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043271265323003944/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 An adviser to Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ali Akbar Velayati, said that “the keys to the Strait of Hormuz are in our hands”. Iranian First Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref added: “We will defend the rights of our people, from control of the Strait of Hormuz to obtaining war reparations.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗最高领袖顾问阿里·阿克巴尔·韦拉亚提表示，“霍尔木兹海峡的钥匙掌握在我们手中”。伊朗第一副总统穆罕默德·礼萨·阿雷夫补充道：“我们将捍卫我们人民的权利，从控制霍尔木兹海峡到获得战争赔偿。” @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated Peskov says the so-called SVO will continue after the Easter truce until Zelensky “finds the courage” to make peace with Russia. The Easter truce between Ukraine and Russia just started. It runs from 16:00 on April 11 to the end of April 12. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 佩斯科夫表示，所谓的特别军事行动（SVO）将在复活节停火后继续，直到泽连斯基“找到勇气”与俄罗斯讲和。乌克兰和俄罗斯之间的复活节停火刚刚开始。停火时间为4月11日16:00至4月12日结束。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel Canada's PM says the era of 70% of Canada's defense spending going to the U.S. is over. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043266647192998020/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）加拿大总理表示，加拿大70%的国防开支流向美国的时代已经结束。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043266647192998020/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @VeryBrexitProbs : MAGA thinks Europe can't defend itself without America. Here's what they don't know. 1. France and Britain have 515 nuclear warheads and 8 nuclear missile submarines. 2. European defence spending hit €481 billion this year. That's more than Russia and China spend combined. The EU's ReArm Europe plan is mobilising another €800 billion. 3. European countries have over 1.7 million active troops. Russia has 1.3 million. 4. EU and UK air forces fly over 1,400 combat aircraft. Their navies have five aircraft carriers, over 60 submarines, more than 120 frigates and destroyers. 5. Europe has over 6,000 artillery pieces and that's before the biggest rearmament wave since the Cold War. Poland alone is adding 212 new howitzers. 6. The British SAS invented modern special forces. The US copied them to build Delta Force. From France's Foreign Legion to Poland's GROM, Europe's elite units are among the deadliest on earth. 7. Europe already has joint military commands ready to fight. The UK leads a 10-nation rapid reaction force across Northern Europe and the Arctic. Finland alone can mobilise 900,000 trained reservists all prepared to fight in arctic conditions. 8. Europe has its own satellite navigation (Galileo), its own defence programme (75 active projects) and is building its own rapid deployment force. The "helpless Europe" story was never about defence. It was about keeping Europe dependent and buying American weapons, relying on American intelligence, following American foreign policy. Thanks to Trump, that now ends. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix RT @VeryBrexitProbs：MAGA（让美国再次伟大）认为没有美国，欧洲就无法自卫。这是他们不知道的事实。1. 法国和英国拥有515枚核弹头和8艘核导弹潜艇。2. 欧洲今年的国防开支达到4810亿欧元。这超过了俄罗斯和中国的总和。欧盟的“重新武装欧洲”计划正在动员另外8000亿欧元。3. 欧洲国家拥有超过170万现役部队。俄罗斯有130万。4. 欧盟和英国空军拥有超过1400架作战飞机。他们的海军拥有5艘航空母舰、60多艘潜艇、超过120艘护卫舰和驱逐舰。5. 欧洲拥有超过6000门火炮，这还是在冷战以来最大规模的重新武装浪潮之前。仅波兰就增加了212门新榴弹炮。6. 英国SAS发明了现代特种部队。美国效仿他们建立了三角洲部队。从法国外籍军团到波兰GROM，欧洲的精锐部队是世界上最致命的部队之一。7. 欧洲已经拥有随时准备战斗的联合军事指挥部。英国领导着一支横跨北欧和北极的10国快速反应部队。仅芬兰就能动员90万名受过训练的预备役人员，他们都准备在北极条件下作战。8. 欧洲拥有自己的卫星导航系统（伽利略）、自己的防御计划（75个活跃项目），并正在建立自己的快速部署部队。“无助的欧洲”的故事从来不是关于防御。它是关于保持欧洲的依赖性，购买美国武器，依赖美国情报，追随美国外交政策。多亏了特朗普，这一切现在结束了。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref: “From asserting authority in the Strait of Hormuz to pursuing reparations, we stand firm for the people's rights.” The Islamic regime appears unwilling to budge. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043264597742817439/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）伊朗副总统穆罕默德·礼萨·阿雷夫：“从主张霍尔木兹海峡的权威到寻求赔偿，我们坚定地捍卫人民的权利。” 伊斯兰政权似乎不愿让步。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043264597742817439/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Diz-me com quem andas e diremos quem és. Amanhã, a Hungria vai a votos 🇭🇺 @PM_ViktorOrban Orbán volta a ir a jogo… e os resultados falam por si 💪 Uma das taxas de natalidade mais altas da União Europeia, vários anos acima de 1,5 filhos por mulher 📊 Crescimento económico com ambição acima da média europeia 📈 Nada disto é por acaso. É o resultado de políticas que colocam o país, as famílias e a soberania em primeiro lugar ✋ Amanhã, os húngaros decidem. E a Europa devia prestar atenção. Mais soberania, menos submissão 🔥 #Hungria #Eleições #Orbán #Soberania #Europa #Portugal #Chega 🇵🇹 - Pedro dos Santos Frazão tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 物以类聚，人以群分。明天，匈牙利将进行投票 🇭🇺 @PM_ViktorOrban 欧尔班再次出战……结果不言自明 💪 欧盟最高的出生率之一，连续多年每名女性生育率超过1.5个孩子 📊 经济增长雄心高于欧洲平均水平 📈 这一切都不是偶然的。这是将国家、家庭和主权放在首位的政策结果 ✋ 明天，匈牙利人将做出决定。欧洲应该注意。更多主权，更少顺从 🔥 #匈牙利 #选举 #欧尔班 #主权 #欧洲 #葡萄牙 #Chega 🇵🇹 - Pedro dos Santos Frazão 推文

text: WarTranslated Swedish Coast Guard detained the Panama-flagged bulk carrier Hui Yuan near Ystad after aircraft spotted it dumping coal waste, SVT reports. It was en route from Ust-Luga to Las Palmas and is now anchored off Sweden. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043262809354445178/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 据SVT报道，瑞典海岸警卫队在飞机发现巴拿马籍散货船“Hui Yuan”号倾倒煤渣后，在于斯塔德附近将其扣留。该船原定从乌斯季卢加前往拉斯帕尔马斯，目前停泊在瑞典近海。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043262809354445178/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @AdamKinzinger : "The Lego videos are funny. The situation is not. A theocracy that blocks its own people's access to the internet is currently running circles around the United States in the information space of an active conflict. That does not happen by accident. It happens because one side prepared and the other side burned down its own capacity and called it a victory for free speech." (Link in reply) tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @AdamKinzinger：“乐高视频很有趣。但情况并不好。一个阻止本国人民访问互联网的神权国家，目前在活跃冲突的信息空间中绕着美国转。这并非偶然。这是因为一方做了准备，而另一方烧毁了自己的能力，并称之为言论自由的胜利。”（链接在回复中） 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has decided to delay his trip to the United Nations and the United States in order to continue managing the government’s work from Beirut amid the current internal situation. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇸🇾 MTV: Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has postponed his U.S. visit after internal advice warned of a potential trap involving an alleged secret meeting with an Israeli envoy. He may face pressure to meet Israeli representatives, risking domestic backlash. The visit has not been cancelled. Lebanese officials confirmed that Lebanon has separated its issue from Iran’s in preliminary talks with the U.S. and Israel, insisting on a ceasefire before negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总理纳吉布·米卡提（Nawaf Salam）决定推迟前往联合国和美国的行程，以便在当前国内局势下继续管理政府工作。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇸🇾 MTV：黎巴嫩总理纳吉布·米卡提在内部建议警告可能存在涉及与以色列特使秘密会面的陷阱后，推迟了美国之行。他可能面临会见以色列代表的压力，从而冒着引发国内强烈反对的风险。访问并未取消。黎巴嫩官员证实，黎巴嫩在与美国和以色列的初步会谈中已将其问题与伊朗的问题分开，坚持在谈判前实现停火。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 US‑Iran talks in Islamabad ended without a breakthrough after nine hours. Iran presented reasonable initiatives but excessive U.S. demands prevented a framework, Per Tasnim. The Key obstacles: Lebanon and the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. refused to include Lebanon in any deal with Iran, wanting to hand the issue entirely to Israel. On Hormuz, Washington sought to open it now without a future Iranian role. Iran insists no change to the strait’s status unless a reasonable agreement is reached. The U.S. proposed that enriched uranium be removed from Iranian soil – a red line for Tehran. Another round may take place within 7‑10 days with a different U.S. delegation level, Per Al-Araby Al-Jadeed. Israel believes the ceasefire may be extended to allow continued contacts, Per Kan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 美伊伊斯兰堡会谈在九小时后结束，未取得突破。据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，伊朗提出了合理的倡议，但美国过分的要求阻碍了框架的达成。关键障碍：黎巴嫩和霍尔木兹海峡。美国拒绝将黎巴嫩纳入与伊朗的任何协议，希望将该问题完全交给以色列。关于霍尔木兹海峡，华盛顿寻求立即开放，且不给予伊朗未来角色。伊朗坚持除非达成合理协议，否则海峡地位不变。美国提议将浓缩铀从伊朗领土移走——这对德黑兰来说是一条红线。据《新阿拉伯人报》（Al-Araby Al-Jadeed）报道，另一轮会谈可能会在7-10天内由不同级别的美国代表团进行。据Kan报道，以色列认为停火可能会延长以允许继续接触。 @wfwitness

text: 📸 Türkiye's ASELSAN announces that mass production and delivery of homegrown LGK-82 laser guidance kits is ongoing after completing factory acceptance tests. The kit is designed for high-precision strikes against fixed and moving targets with reduced collateral damage.
text_zh: 📸 土耳其ASELSAN宣布，在完成工厂验收测试后，国产LGK-82激光制导套件的批量生产和交付正在进行中。该套件旨在对固定和移动目标进行高精度打击，并减少附带损害。

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Zionist occupiers are deliberately intensifying the humanitarian crisis in Gaza by extensively restricting the entry of aid, including flour, which has led to a continuous increase in bread prices amid severe poverty in Gaza. - Hamas
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 犹太复国主义占领者通过广泛限制包括面粉在内的援助物资进入，蓄意加剧加沙的人道主义危机，导致加沙在极端贫困的情况下，面包价格持续上涨。 - 哈马斯

text: Iran's Ghalibaf on failed negotiations with the U.S. in Pakistan: We have the necessary goodwill and determination, but due to the experience of two previous wars, we do not trust the other side. The other side ultimately failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of negotiations America has understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for it to decide whether it can earn our trust or not. We consider ‘power diplomacy’ another method alongside military struggle to secure the rights of the Iranian nation.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫谈及在巴基斯坦与美国谈判失败：我们有必要的善意和决心，但由于前两次战争的经历，我们不信任对方。对方最终在本轮谈判中未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是时候让它决定是否能赢得我们的信任了。我们将“实力外交”视为与军事斗争并行的另一种方法，以捍卫伊朗民族的权利。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said that after 21 hours of intense talks in Islamabad, the U.S. failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation. “America understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for them to decide whether they can earn our trust,” he stated. Ghalibaf noted that Iran had good faith and will, but due to the experience of two previous wars, there is no trust in the US. He described “diplomacy of power” as another path alongside military struggle to secure Iran’s rights. He thanked Pakistan for facilitating the talks and praised the Iranian people for their support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的紧张会谈后，美国未能获得伊朗代表团的信任。“美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是时候让他们决定是否能赢得我们的信任了，”他说道。卡利巴夫指出，伊朗怀有诚意和意愿，但由于前两次战争的经历，对美国没有信任。他将“实力外交”描述为与军事斗争并行的另一条道路，以捍卫伊朗的权利。他感谢巴基斯坦促进了会谈，并赞扬了伊朗人民的支持。 @wfwitness

May this day bring you warmth, hope, and a quiet sense of renewal, wherever you are. @wfwitness" From the WFW team, we wish all those celebrating a peaceful and blessed Orthodox Easter 🐣 , may this day bring you hope, renewal, and a sense of unity wherever you are. @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iran's Parliament Speaker Qalibaf: — US failed to earn Iran’s trust despite Iran’s goodwill and constructive proposals during the latest round of talks. — Iran entered the negotiations with serious intent, but past experiences from previous wars left Tehran skeptical. — Iran’s delegation presented forward-looking initiatives, yet the other side ultimately could not build confidence. — The US now understands Iran’s principles and must decide whether it can gain Iran’s trust. — Iran views “power diplomacy” as a key tool alongside military resistance to secure the nation’s rights, and will not stop working to consolidate the achievements of its 40 days of national defense. — Grateful to 'friendly and brotherly' Pakistan for hosting. — Iran is one body with 90 million souls. I thank all the heroic people of Iran who, following the advice of the Supreme Leader and by being present in the streets, supported their children and accompanied us with their prayers, and I say well done to my colleagues in these intense 21-hour negotiations. Long live and prosper dear Iran!
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：— 尽管伊朗在最新一轮会谈中表现出善意并提出了建设性建议，但美国未能赢得伊朗的信任。— 伊朗带着严肃的意图参加了谈判，但过去战争的经历让德黑兰持怀疑态度。— 伊朗代表团提出了前瞻性的倡议，但对方最终无法建立信心。— 美国现在理解了伊朗的原则，必须决定是否能赢得伊朗的信任。— 伊朗将“实力外交”视为与军事抵抗并行的关键工具，以捍卫国家权利，并将继续努力巩固其40天国防的成果。— 感谢“友好兄弟”巴基斯坦的主办。— 伊朗是一个拥有9000万灵魂的统一体。我感谢所有英雄的伊朗人民，他们遵循最高领袖的建议，走上街头支持他们的孩子，并与我们一起祈祷，我也为我的同事们在这次紧张的21小时谈判中所做的努力点赞。伟大的伊朗万岁，繁荣昌盛！

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 US-Iran joint control of Strait of Hormuz — Pakistan plan. Pakistan diplomatic source to Al Jazeera.

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump stated that he is considering the possibility of a naval blockade of Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
